title: sagina maritima var. debilis
intro: Sagina maritima var. debilis, also known as Sea Pearlwort, is a low-growing, annual or biennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sea Pearlwort include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, with dried leaves and flowers being commonly used for medicinal purposes.
